expectations.text: Output contains YAML frontmatter (fenced by ---) with at least tags, date, and status fields
expectations.evidence: Frontmatter present between --- fences. Contains: tags (list with project, active, client, hr), date: 2026-04-24, status: active

expectations.text: Output uses wikilinks [[Meridian Consulting]] and [[HR Portal Requirements]], not markdown links
expectations.evidence: Both wikilinks appear multiple times: [[Meridian Consulting]] on lines 14, 21, 28, 49 and [[HR Portal Requirements]] on lines 15, 21, 38, 50. No markdown-style links ([text](url)) used for these references.

expectations.text: Output includes at least 3 task items using - [ ] checkbox syntax
expectations.evidence: Five tasks with - [ ] syntax found on lines 35-39: kickoff meeting, review requirements, set up repository, draft architecture, deliver wireframes

expectations.text: Output uses a heading structure appropriate for a project note
expectations.evidence: H1 title 'Meridian Consulting — HR Portal Rebuild', followed by H2 sections: Details, Tasks, Notes, Related — a clear and logical project note structure

expectations.text: Output does not use any forbidden characters in file path (# ^ [ ] | \)
expectations.evidence: The note.md filename contains none of the forbidden characters. The title 'Meridian Consulting — HR Portal Rebuild' uses an em dash (—), not any forbidden character.

expectations.text: Due date is represented as 2026-06-30 in frontmatter
expectations.evidence: Frontmatter line 11: 'due: 2026-06-30' — exact ISO date format match

suggestions: Consider adding a 'file_path' expectation to verify the note is saved to the correct vault location (e.g., 1-Projects/ folder)
A test for the Obsidian callout syntax (> [!info]) could validate richer note formatting beyond basic structure
eval_feedback.overall: Perfect score — all 6 expectations passed. The generated note correctly uses YAML frontmatter with required fields, wikilinks throughout, 5 checkbox tasks, a logical H1/H2 heading structure, a valid filename, and the exact due date 2026-06-30. The skill produced a well-formed Obsidian project note with no errors.
